invariant_noShareInflation().notice: sum of (shares * exchangeRate) <= totalAssets (no share inflation)

invariant_shareSupplyConsistency().notice: ARM token supply conserved (not applicable - this is USDC vault)Share supply matches sum of balances (ERC20 invariant)

invariant_totalAssetsConsistency().notice: totalAssets() equals USDC held by vault in the spoke

invariant_vaultHoldsNoIdleUsdc().notice: Vault's USDC balance + spoke balance = total in system (vault holds 0, spoke holds all)
